business.name: GBG Auto Repair & Inspection
business.hours: Mon-Fri: 7:30 AM – 6:00 PM, Sat: 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM

seo.title: GBG Auto Repair & Inspection | Expert Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: GBG Auto Repair & Inspection provides premium auto repair, diagnostics, and inspections in Dallas, TX. Certified technicians, honest pricing, and fast service. Call (214) 370-0375.

hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair You Can Trust
hero.subheadline: From routine maintenance to complex diagnostics, our certified mechanics deliver quality service with transparent pricing.

featureSections.title: Accurate Diagnostics Mean Faster Repairs
featureSections.body: We use the latest diagnostic equipment to pinpoint issues quickly, saving you time and money. No guesswork, just precise solutions.
featureSections.cardBody: We show you exactly what’s wrong and what it will cost before any work begins.

featureSections.title: Expertise Across All Makes and Models
featureSections.body: Our ASE-certified mechanics have decades of combined experience. Whether it’s a domestic sedan or a European import, we’ve got you covered.
featureSections.cardBody: All parts and labor come with a comprehensive warranty for your confidence.

whyChooseUs.title: Honest Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees or upsells. We provide upfront estimates and stick to them.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: Most repairs completed same day or within 24 hours. We respect your time.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Parts
whyChooseUs.description: We use OEM and high-quality aftermarket parts to ensure long-lasting performance.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer First
whyChooseUs.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We communicate every step of the way.

testimonials.quote: GBG saved me hundreds compared to the dealership. They were honest and the work was flawless.
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.quote: Fast, professional, and they explained everything clearly. I’ll never go anywhere else.
testimonials.author: Jessica L.

testimonials.quote: I was nervous about a major repair, but the team made it painless. My car runs better than ever.
testimonials.author: David K.

cta.headline: Ready to Experience Premium Auto Care?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and see why Dallas trusts GBG.

servicesPage.intro: From routine oil changes to major engine repairs, GBG Auto Repair & Inspection offers comprehensive auto services backed by decades of experience. We treat every car like it’s our own.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert repairs for check engine lights, performance issues, and more.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic tools identify the root cause of engine problems quickly. Whether it’s a sensor failure or a major overhaul, we provide reliable solutions.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system and run a full scan.

process.title: Analysis
process.description: Our technician interprets the data and explains the issue in plain terms.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We perform the repair using quality parts and test-drive to confirm.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within an hour. Complex issues may require more time.

faqs.question: Do you service all car brands?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work on domestic, Asian, and European vehicles.

services.title: Brake Services
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspections, pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, and fluid flushes.
services.longDescription: Your safety depends on your brakes. We inspect every component and recommend only what’s necessary. From squeaky pads to soft pedals, we restore stopping power.

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We measure pad thickness, rotor condition, and fluid levels.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We provide a detailed report with options and pricing.

process.title: Service
process.description: We replace worn parts and perform a road test for quality.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits.

faqs.question: Do you offer brake pad warranties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we warranty all brake parts and labor for your peace of mind.

services.title: Oil Change & Preventive Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular oil changes and multi-point inspections.
services.longDescription: We use premium synthetic and conventional oils to protect your engine. Every oil change includes a complimentary multi-point inspection to catch small issues before they become big problems.

process.title: Oil Drain & Fill
process.description: We drain old oil and replace with the correct grade and quantity.

process.title: Filter Replacement
process.description: A new oil filter ensures clean oil circulation.

process.title: Multi-Point Inspection
process.description: We check belts, hoses, fluids, tires, and brakes at no extra cost.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We offer both conventional and synthetic options to match your vehicle’s needs.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern cars need every 5,000-7,500 miles. Check your owner’s manual.

services.title: State Inspections & Emissions Testing
services.shortDescription: Fast, hassle-free Texas state inspections and emissions testing for all vehicles.
services.longDescription: We are a certified inspection station. Get your annual safety and emissions test done quickly without the wait. If your vehicle fails, we’ll help you understand why and fix it.

process.title: Check-In
process.description: Drop off your vehicle or wait in our comfortable lobby.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We perform the required safety and emissions tests.

process.title: Result
process.description: If passed, you get your sticker immediately. If not, we offer repair options.

faqs.question: What is checked during a Texas state inspection?
faqs.answer: Brakes, lights, tires, horn, wipers, mirrors, seat belts, and emissions (in applicable counties).

faqs.question: Can you fix issues found during inspection?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can perform most repairs on-site to get you back on the road quickly.

about.headline: Dallas’s Trusted Auto Repair Experts
about.mission: Our mission is to provide honest, high-quality auto repair with transparency and integrity. We believe in treating every customer like family.
story: GBG Auto Repair & Inspection was founded in 2005 with a simple goal: offer reliable auto repair without the dealership price tag. Starting with just two bays, we quickly earned a reputation for honest diagnostics and quality work. Over the years, we’ve grown into a full-service shop serving thousands of Dallas drivers.

Today, our team of ASE-certified technicians continues that tradition. We invest in the latest tools and training to handle everything from routine maintenance to complex engine repairs. But our core values remain the same: transparency, quality, and customer satisfaction. Whether you’re a first-time visitor or a long-time customer, you’ll always get straight answers and fair prices.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs. Our estimates are honest and thorough.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: Every repair is done right the first time using top-tier parts and techniques.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your time and money with respect. Clear communication and timely service.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We’re proud to serve Dallas and support local causes whenever we can.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with GBG Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule? Call or fill out the form below and we’ll get back to you fast.
